title: Verify sending a comment with fewer than 3 words
steps: 1. Type "Hello friend" in the reply box.
expected: The text box shows validation error "3 words are required." and the send button is disabled.
actual: Text box shows "3 words are required." and send button is disabled.

title: Verify sending a comment containing emojis
steps: 1. Type "Working on it now 😊" in the reply box.
expected: Validation error "Emojis are not allowed." is displayed and send button is disabled.
actual: Validation error "Emojis are not allowed." is displayed.

title: Verify sending a comment with excessive consecutive spaces
steps: 1. Type "I have started working" (3 spaces in between) in the reply box.
expected: Validation error "Please avoid excessive spaces." is displayed.
actual: Validation error "Please avoid excessive spaces." is displayed.

title: Verify sending a comment with spam repeated characters
steps: 1. Type "workkkkkkkkk on tickets" in the reply box.
expected: Validation error "Please enter a meaningful description." is displayed.
actual: Validation error "Please enter a meaningful description." is displayed.

title: Verify form shows an error when trying to submit without selecting a leave type.
description: Apply For Leave modal is open.
steps: Click Start Date > Select '2026-05-01' > Click End Date > Select '2026-05-02' > Enter Reason as 'Doctor checkup appointment' > Click 'Submit Request'.
expected: A red error message "Please select an option." appears under the Leave Type field and form is not submitted.
actual: Error message "Please select an option." is displayed and submission is blocked.

title: Verify selecting a Start Date that is after the End Date displays a validation error.
description: Apply For Leave modal is open. End Date is set to 2026-05-05.
steps: Click 'START DATE' > Select '2026-05-10' on the calendar.
expected: The system prevents selection or shows a validation message saying that the start date must be before the end date.
actual: An error toast pops up saying "Start date should be less than end date." and the change is blocked.

title: Verify selecting an End Date that is before the Start Date displays a validation error.
description: Apply For Leave modal is open. Start Date is set to 2026-05-10.
steps: Click 'END DATE' > Select '2026-05-05' on the calendar.
expected: The system prevents selection or shows a validation message: "End date should be greater than start date."
actual: An error toast pops up saying "End date should be greate than start date."

title: Verify request is blocked if the requested days exceed available PTO balance.
description: User has 10 PTO available. Apply For Leave modal is open.
steps: Select Leave Type as 'PTO' > Select Start Date as '2026-06-01' > Select End Date as '2026-06-15' (11 working days).
expected: An error box displays "INSUFFICIENT BALANCE. AVAILABLE: 10 DAYS" and the "Submit Request" button becomes greyed out and disabled.
actual: Error box appears and the "Submit Request" button is disabled.

title: Verify request is blocked if requested days exceed available Sick leave balance.
description: User has 5 Sick leaves available. Apply For Leave modal is open.
steps: Select Leave Type as 'Sick' > Select Start Date as '2026-05-01' > Select End Date as '2026-05-09' (7 working days).
expected: An error box displays "INSUFFICIENT BALANCE. AVAILABLE: 5 DAYS" and the submit button is disabled.
actual: Error box appears and submit button is disabled.

title: Verify reason field shows an error when the explanation is too short (fewer than 3 words).
description: Apply For Leave modal is open.
steps: Select Leave Type as 'PTO' > Select valid dates > Click on 'REASON FOR LEAVE' > Type "I am sick" > Click outside the field.
expected: An error message "3 words are required." appears below the Reason field.
actual: Error message "3 words are required." is shown.

title: Verify that emojis are not allowed in the Reason field.
description: Apply For Leave modal is open.
steps: Select Leave Type as 'PTO' > Select valid dates > Click 'REASON FOR LEAVE' > Type "Going for vacation " > Click outside.
expected: An error message "Emojis are not allowed." is displayed.
actual: Error message "Emojis are not allowed." is displayed.

title: Verify spam character patterns are blocked in the Reason field.
description: Apply For Leave modal is open.
steps: Select Leave Type as 'PTO' > Select valid dates > Click 'REASON FOR LEAVE' > Type "vacationnnnnnnnnnnnn" > Click outside.
expected: An error message "Please enter a meaningful description." is displayed.
actual: Error message "Please enter a meaningful description." is displayed.

title: Verify that multiple consecutive spaces between words are blocked in Reason.
description: Apply For Leave modal is open.
steps: Click 'REASON FOR LEAVE' > Type "vacation with family" > Click outside.
expected: An error message "Please avoid excessive spaces." is displayed.
actual: Error message "Please avoid excessive spaces." is displayed.

title: Verify that a reason longer than 500 characters cannot be submitted.
description: Apply For Leave modal is open.
steps: Select Leave Type as 'PTO' > Select valid dates > Click 'REASON FOR LEAVE' > Enter a text of 510 characters > Click 'Submit Request'.
expected: The form prevents submission and shows a validation error message because the characters exceed the 500 limit.
actual: The form allows submission because the validation utility does not check max length and there is no maxLength property on the textarea.

title: In the Edit Leave modal, entering a reason over 500 characters is blocked.
steps: Type a reason containing 515 characters > Click 'Update Request'.
expected: The system displays a validation error and blocks the update.
actual: The system allows submission because max length is not validated.

title: Verify subject input shows error if text is too short.
steps: Click 'Subject' > Type "Help" (4 characters) > Click outside.
expected: A red error message "Must be at least 5 characters." appears below Subject.
actual: Error "Must be at least 5 characters." is displayed.

title: Verify subject input shows error if text exceeds 100 characters.
steps: Click 'Subject' > Enter a string of 105 characters > Click outside.
expected: An error message "Cannot exceed 100 characters." is displayed.
actual: Error message is shown.

title: Verify subject input blocks numeric-only text.
steps: Click 'Subject' > Type "12345" > Click outside.
expected: An error message "Numbers are not allowed." is displayed.
actual: Error message is shown.

title: Verify subject input blocks invalid special characters.
steps: Click 'Subject' > Type "Help!!! @home" > Click outside.
expected: An error message "Special characters are not allowed." is displayed.
actual: Error message is shown.

title: Verify description input shows error if it has fewer than 3 words.
steps: Click 'Detailed Description' > Type "Need help" (2 words) > Click outside.
expected: An error message "3 words are required." is displayed.
actual: Error message is shown.

title: Verify that emojis are not allowed in the ticket description.
steps: Click 'Detailed Description' > Type "My laptop screen is broken " > Click outside.
expected: An error message "Emojis are not allowed." is displayed.
actual: Error message is shown.

title: Verify that repetitive letters or words are blocked as spam.
steps: Click 'Detailed Description' > Type "aaaaaaa screen issue" > Click outside.
expected: An error message "Please enter a meaningful description." is displayed.
actual: Error message is shown.

title: Verify that uploading a duplicate file (same name and size) shows an error.
description: Raise Ticket modal is open. A file "error_screenshot.png" is already attached.
steps: Click 'Choose Files' > Select the exact same "error_screenshot.png" > Click Open.
expected: Error message "File(s) already attached: error_screenshot.png" is displayed.
actual: Duplicate block error is shown.

title: Verify attempting to upload more than 5 files shows an error.
description: Raise Ticket modal is open. 4 files are already attached.
steps: Click 'Choose Files' > Select 2 more files > Click Open.
expected: Error message "Maximum 5 files allowed..." is displayed.
actual: Error message is shown and only valid files within limit are added.

title: Verify attempting to upload a file larger than 100MB shows an error.
steps: Click 'Choose Files' > Select a 120MB video file > Click Open.
expected: Error message "File size exceeds 100 MB limit..." is displayed.
actual: Error message is shown.

title: Verify entering a very short reply fails.
steps: Click on the reply text box > Type "Hi" > Click the send icon.
expected: An error message "Must be at least 5 characters." or similar is shown.
actual: An error message "3 words are required." is shown because the text has only 1 word, and the system fails to validate character length constraints.

title: No leaves applied
steps: N/A
expected: System displays “No records found” message
actual: Fail

title: Ticket exists
steps: Ticket ID = TK001
expected: Correct ticket record displayed
actual: Fail

title: Tickets exist
steps: N/A
expected: Selected action performed successfully
actual: Fail

title: Confirmation popup enabled
steps: Confirm Yes
expected: Logout successful
actual: Fail

title: Positive
steps: User is checked in
expected: Click 'Start Break'

title: Negative
steps: User is not checked in
expected: Look at screen

title: Edge Case
steps: User has no records
expected: Click 'Export CSV'
actual: Empty file downloads anyway.

title: Discussion - Exceed Comment Limit
steps: 1. Copy a long text of 510 characters.
expected: An error message 'Cannot exceed 500 characters' should display, blocking submission.
actual: Error message appears in red below input box and send is blocked.

title: Discussion - File Size Exceeds 5MB
steps: 1. Click the Paperclip icon next to input.
expected: A toast error message 'File size must be less than 5MB' should appear, rejecting file.
actual: File is rejected and toast error pops up.

title: Discussion - Too Long Comment
steps: 1. Paste comment of 10 characters.
expected: Error message 'Cannot exceed 20 characters' appears below.
actual: Input border turns red and error message displays.

title: Update attendance status to an empty value.
description: Admin is logged in and on the Attendance Log screen.
steps: Locate row for "MUNAWAR" > Click "Edit" icon > Clear the status selection > Click "Update".
expected: The form displays an error message "Status is required" and the update is blocked.
actual: The validation message displays and the update button remains disabled.

title: Add a user with an invalid email address format.
description: Admin is logged in and on the User Management screen.
steps: Click "Add User" > Enter "sara.com" in the Email box > Enter Name > Click "Save".
expected: An error message "Please enter a valid email address" appears under the Email field.
actual: Form remains open showing error label, block save request.

title: Add a user with a short password.
description: Admin is logged in and on the User Management screen.
steps: Click "Add User" > Fill all details > Set Password as "123" > Click "Save".
expected: An error warning "Password must be at least 6 characters long" displays under field.
actual: System blocks form submission and shows validation error.

title: Add a user with an email that is already registered.
description: Admin is logged in and on the User Management screen.
steps: Click "Add User" > Enter details > Set email as "
expected: An error message saying "This email is already in use" displays at the top of form.
actual: Modal shows an error message "Email already registered" from the form validation.

title: Summary cards without internet
steps: Turn off wifi > Refresh page
expected: Shows error message "Network issue"
actual: Cards show loading spinner forever

title: Verify responsiveness on Mobile Viewport (375px)
description: User opens Org Chart on a phone
steps: 1. Resize browser window to 375px width.
expected: The header blocks stack vertically, and the canvas adjusts width dynamically.
actual: No Mobile responsive

title: Verify responsiveness on Tablet Viewport (768px)
description: User opens Org Chart on a tablet
steps: 1. Resize browser window to 768px width.
expected: Zoom controls and chart canvas remain accessible, text sizes scale.
actual: No Mobile responsive

title: Check-in/out exists
expected: Duration calculated correctly (9 hours)
actual: Fail

title: Add manual attendance with missing employee name.
description: Admin is logged in and on the Attendance Log screen.
steps: Click "Add Attendance" button > Leave Employee dropdown empty > Select "Present" > Click "Save".
expected: A red error message saying "Please select an employee" appears under the field.
actual: Pop-up modal shows a red warning text and prevents submission.

title: Attempt to upload an invalid file type as profile picture.
description: Admin is logged in and on the User Edit form.
steps: Click "Upload Photo" button > Select a file "document.txt" > Click "Save".
expected: A warning "Invalid file format. Please upload PNG or JPG images" displays.
actual: Validation banner displays error message and blocks upload.

title: Attempt to upload a very large profile picture (over 5MB).
description: Admin is logged in and on the User Edit form.
steps: Click "Upload Photo" button > Choose an image file "huge_photo.jpg" (6.2MB) > Click "Save".
expected: A warning "File size limit exceeded. Max limit is 5MB" displays on screen.
actual: File upload is stopped and error message is displayed.

title: Edit Email (Invalid format)
steps: Type "john.com" (no @) > Click Save
expected: Shows error "Invalid email format"
actual: Shows error message

title: Change pass: missing old
steps: Leave 'Old Password' empty > Save
expected: Shows error "Current password needed"
actual: Prompts for old password

title: Server timeout on save
steps: Click Save during bad internet
expected: Shows "Request timed out, try again"
actual: Infinite loading spinner

title: Very long email text
steps: Enter a 30-character email address
expected: Email text wraps nicely, doesn't break box
actual: Text overflows out of the white box

title: Verify accessing the page from a mobile browser blocks access.
description: User attempts to access the page on a mobile device or touch-enabled browser window.
steps: Open the application on a mobile phone or simulate touch devices in developer tools.
expected: The system blocks access and renders a "Mobile" screen instead of the dashboard.
actual: not

title: Add a user with empty required field inputs.
description: Admin is logged in and on the User Management screen.
steps: Click "Add User" > Leave "Full Name" empty > Enter valid email and role > Click "Save".
expected: A red notification saying "Full Name is required" displays next to the input field.
actual: Warning validation error displays and form cannot be submitted.

title: login to abidipro navigate to Raise a ticket page from sidebar
description: User is on the Ticket List page with data loaded.
steps: Clicking any column should not change the alignment of headers or data cells.
expected: Selecting any column causes unexpected realignment of column headers and data cells.
actual: Selecting any column does not change the alignment of column headers or data cells.

title: login to abidipro navigate to Assigned ticket page from sidebar
steps: "MEDIUM" should be yellow (as on Page 1).
expected: "MEDIUM" appears in red.
actual: "MEDIUM" is yellow (same as on Page 1).

title: Notification bell click
expected: A dropdown list of alerts opens
actual: Alert dropdown opens
